examples: There was a clutter of bottles and tubes on the shelf.
Caroline prefers her countertops to be clear of clutter.
The result was a slash-and-build clutter that got uglier by the year.
The wider aisles, reduced clutter and cleaner displays showcases furniture, beauty supplies, shoes and other items.
While figuring out what to do next, she held a garage sale to de-clutter her house.
